🎯

Jira integration is only available in local mode.

This hosted version can't reach your Jira proxy. Download the source, run it locally with VS Code Live Server, and Jira sync works out of the box.

🔗 Get the code on GitHub
⚙️

Start the proxy in a terminal (node jira-proxy.js), then open Settings to configure your Jira URL.

📊 Activity Heatmap
Less
More
⚙️ Settings — Jira Integration

Requires the local proxy running in a terminal: python jira-proxy.py

▶ How to get your cookie (click to expand)
  1. Open telushealth.atlassian.net in your browser (log in if asked)
  2. Press F12 to open DevTools → click the Network tab
  3. Click any request in the list (e.g. the first one)
  4. In the right panel scroll to Request Headers
  5. Find the cookie: row → right-click it → Copy value
  6. Paste below and click Update Cookie

Cookies expire after ~24 hours — come back here to refresh when Jira stops loading.

Used for issue links — no trailing slash

Status
Priority (blank = any)
Updated
Projects (e.g. HBMADJ, CRM)
Generated JQL

Overrides the builder above entirely when filled. Leave blank to use the builder.
